calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-12-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-12-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as assigned from the Presiding Judge Master Calendar for Court Trial/Prove-Up.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Philip Kilduff, Esq., for Plaintiff: Retailers National Bank.
No appearance by the Defendant: Paeng t. Thammavong.
PLTF EXH #1 - Trial Brief and Declarations---------------ID/EVID.
The Court hears and considered the evidence, declaration in lieu of live testimony, grants judgment as follows:
Judgment in favor of plaintiff and against defendant.
Damages in the amount of $3,793.04
No interest.
Attorney's Fees of $720.00
Costs of $120.30
For the total of $4,633.34
Counsel stipulated for return of exhibits and prepare Judgment for signature.

April 19, 2004
Judgment received in court and forward to Comm. Kaplan for signature (out of the office today)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-12-2003 Set For Trial On Apr-12-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
